name: Aurelia Diamond Pendant
description: An exquisite 18k solid yellow gold necklace featuring a brilliant-cut center diamond surrounded by delicate filigree work. Handcrafted to reflect the timeless craftsmanship of Trimetra.

name: Luna Pearl Choker
description: Luminous South Sea pearls hand-selected for their mirror-like luster, strung together with a signature 18k white gold clasp encrusted with micro-pavé diamonds.

name: Elysian Emerald Drops
description: Breathtaking teardrop Colombian emeralds suspended from line-styled diamond clusters in platinum settings. Designed to sway elegantly with every step.

name: Solitude Gold Studs
description: Timeless solitaire studs showcasing hand-set princess-cut diamonds in a minimalist four-prong 18k yellow gold basket.

name: Vesper Sapphire Halo Ring
description: An enchanting deep royal blue sapphire oval center stone, surrounded by a double halo of sparkling diamonds, set in a polished 18k white gold band.

name: Marquise Horizon Band
description: An elegant, modern eternity band featuring alternating marquise and round brilliant cut diamonds set horizontally in solid rose gold.

name: Empress Bridal Tiara & Set
description: The crown jewel of our Bridal Collection. A magnificent matching set featuring a delicate platinum necklace, matching drop earrings, and a heirloom-quality tiara encrusted with brilliant-cut diamonds.
materials: 8.5ct Total Weight Premium White Diamonds (VVS, D-F)

name: Eternal Promise Set
description: A classic matching engagement ring and wedding band pair. The engagement ring features a stunning 2.0-carat round brilliant diamond solitaire on a platinum band, complemented by a channel-set eternity wedding band.
